expectations: Output must not include any explanation or additional text

evals.prompt:
Compare these two Python files for equivalence:

File A:

def get_discount(price, rate):
    return price * rate

File B:

def get_discount(price, rate):
    disc = price * rate
    return disc
evals.expected_output: true (only local variable extraction inside function body)
expectations: Must recognize local temp variable introduction as allowed internal refactoring

evals.expected_output: false (class renamed from UserService to CustomerService)
expectations: Must detect class name change as a forbidden difference

evals.prompt:
Compare these two Python files for code equivalence:

File A:

def process(user):
    return f"Processing {user}"

File B:

def process(customer):
    return f"Processing {customer}"
evals.expected_output: false (parameter renamed from user to customer)
expectations: Must detect parameter name change as a signature change

evals.expected_output: false (method renamed from subtract to sub)
expectations: Must detect method name change as a forbidden difference

evals.prompt:
Compare these two Python files for code equivalence:

File A:

def is_adult(age):
    return age >= 18

File B:

def is_adult(age):
    return age > 18
expectations: Must detect different comparison operator as a behavioral change
